name: Franklin Bar Cart and Wine Rack Weathered Gray - Threshold™: Vintage Style Beverage Serving Cart with Locking Wheels
description:
Designed to look like a vintage find, the Franklin Bar Cart and Wine Rack brings a factory vibe to your space thanks to its unique, distressed look and a design that showcases its construction.

Overall Width: 27 inches
Overall Height: 32.5 inches
Overall Depth: 15.8 inches
Distance from floor to bottom of bottom of metal frame: 4.2 inches
Distance between shelf to bottom of metal frame: 4.75 inches
